payload.answer: This appears to update the existing memory about Sam’s employer. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory “Sam works at Goldman” with “Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.”
Keep the existing memory “Sam works at Goldman” and do not add the new information.
Keep both as separate memories, preserving the ambiguity until clarified.
Ask for clarification about whether this is the same Sam and whether the Goldman employment is no longer current.
